title: Tsalaph #6764
definition:
Zalaph = "wound"

 1) father of Hanun who assisted in rebuilding the city wall of
    Jerusalem after the return from exile
nasbUsage:
Definition: Zalaph = "wound"

 1) father of Hanun who assisted in rebuilding the city wall of
    Jerusalem after the return from exile

    NASB:  father of one of the builders of the Jer. wall
